core_mechanism: an exact one-to-one correspondence (bijection) between the stationary/critical points of a variational functional and the complete eigenstate spectrum of an integrable operator, with those eigenstates parametrized by the roots of a coupled system of algebraic (Bethe-ansatz) constraint equations
brief_reason: The abstract asserts a one-to-one correspondence between the extremal (vacuum) configurations of one system and the eigenstates of integrable Hamiltonians whose diagonalization is governed by Bethe equations, so the transferable machinery is matching critical-point conditions to a Bethe-ansatz eigenvalue problem.
